content.text:
A few years, probably. Though I've been telling myself it was just... stress, or a phase, or something that would lift when things settled down. Things have settled down, more or less. And it's still there.

I used to have a clearer sense of -- I don't know -- being present in my own life. That's mostly gone now. I keep doing the things I'm supposed to do. Work, the relationship, the weekends. But it's like watching it from a slight distance.
